data.title: Banning Tether is a threat to national monetary security
data.description:
The following is an opinion piece by Tom Howard, Head of Financial Products and Regulatory Affairs at CoinList. Stablecoin Act drafts that would effectively ban Tether and other non-US stablecoin issuers from the US market due to offshore operations are circulating. This approach is a significant policy error. A robust global reserve currency thrives by […]

data.title: Putin Agrees to 30-Day Ceasefire Amid Strategic Advantage in Kursk
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Russian President Vladimir Putin has announced Russia's agreement to a 30-day ceasefire. Despite this, Russia maintains a strategic advantage in the Kursk region. Putin emphasized the need to address whether Ukrainian forces will retreat unharmed or surrender their weapons. 

Putin also highlighted the necessity for further discussions on how the ceasefire will be monitored and how various detailed issues will be resolved. He mentioned the possibility of engaging in dialogue with U.S. President Donald Trump regarding these matters.

data.title: Meteora discloses incentive details: LP rewards increased from 10% to 15%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the incentive details disclosed by Meteora in the live broadcast, the M3M3 ecosystem (including token holders and pledgers) will receive 2% of the token supply allocated by the team, which has been snapshotted; LP rewards have increased from 10% to 15%. Meteora expressed its gratitude to the community for hearing the community's call and the community users who provided honest feedback, which are crucial to the future of Meteora.

data.title: Trump criticizes Wall Street Journal: I don't know what they are doing or saying
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Trump criticized the Wall Street Journal on Truth Social. He said: "I don't know what the Wall Street Journal is doing or saying. Their (Wall Street Journal) ideas are old and weak, which is very unfavorable to the United States. But don't be afraid, we will win everything!!!" 
Previously, the Wall Street Journal published an article revealing that the Trump family is negotiating to acquire a stake in Binance.US. However, Trump's content on Truth Social was suspected to be published a few minutes before the Wall Street Journal article was published. It is not certain whether Trump knew in advance that the Wall Street Journal would publish the relevant article.

data.title: Coinbase International will launch REZ, GRASS and RARE perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase International Station announced that it will add support for Renzo, Grass and SuperRare perpetual contracts. The REZ-PERP, GRASS-PERP and RARE-PERP markets will be opened on or after 9:30 am (UTC time) on March 20, 2025.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Joins XRP ETF Race as CBOE Files Key Application
data.description:
The post Franklin Templeton Joins XRP ETF Race as CBOE Files Key Application appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
The competition for an XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF) is heating up as Franklin Templeton, a major Wall Street firm managing about $1.5 trillion in assets, moves forward with its application. The Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE) has officially filed a 19b-4 form to list...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/franklin-templeton-joins-xrp-etf-race-as-cboe-files-key-application/
